title: Fix circular class reference %p-printing causing infinite recursion
body:
If a class contained directly or via other classes a member that was the same class e.g.

    class Foo;
      Foo m_self_ref;
    endclass

Then printing the class with %p would cause infinite recusion, as the class attempts to print the contents of each reference, forever.

Found with UVM tests/40phasing/99compat/7514_set_phase_imp

To fix this, like most other simulators, change class references to print the class type name (`Foo`), not the contents of Foo.
